title: pilosella densiflora subsp. pycnomnoa
intro: Pilosella densiflora subsp. pycnomnoa, also known as the Alpine Foxglove, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Pilosella densiflora subsp. pycnomnoa are thought to include the relief of urinary tract issues and the reduction of fever. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support the body's natural healing processes.
